title: OpenAI GPT 5 models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving
body: The OpenAI [GPT-5](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5), [GPT-5 mini](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-mini) and [GPT-5 nano](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-nano) models are now generally available in Mosaic AI Model Serving.
